nodes.label: VaultItemListingViewModelTest.kt
VaultItemListingViewModelTest
filterCiphersForMatches()
.setUp()
.tearDown()
.`initial state should be correct`()
.`initial dialog state should be correct when CreateCredentialRequest is present`()
.`RESTRICT_ITEM_TYPES policy changes should update restrictItemTypesPolicyOrgIds accordingly`()
.`on LockAccountClick should call lockVault for the given account`()
.`on LogoutAccountClick should call logout for the given account`()
.`on SwitchAccountClick should switch to the given account`()
.`BackClick with TotpData should emit ExitApp`()
.`BackClick with AutofillSelectionData should emit ExitApp`()
.`BackClick should emit NavigateBack`()
.`DismissDialogClick should clear the dialog state`()
.`SearchIconClick should emit NavigateToVaultSearchScreen`()
.`SearchIconClick should emit NavigateToVaultSearchScreen with all search type`()
.`LockClick should call lockVaultForCurrentUser`()
.`SyncClick should display the loading dialog and call sync`()
.`on SyncClick should show the no network dialog if no connection is available`()
.`ItemClick for vault item when accessibility autofill should post to the accessibilitySelectionManager`()
.`ItemClick for vault item when autofill should post to the AutofillSelectionManager`()
.`ItemClick for vault item during credential registration should show credential error dialog when cipherView is null`()
.`ItemClick for vault item during FIDO 2 registration should show overwrite passkey confirmation when selected cipher has existing passkey`()
.`ItemClick for vault item during FIDO 2 registration should show loading dialog, then request user verification when required`()
.`ItemClick for vault item during FIDO 2 registration should skip user verification and perform registration when discouraged`()
.`ItemClick for vault item during FIDO 2 registration should skip user verification when user is verified`()
.`ItemClick for vault item should emit NavigateToVaultItem`()
.`ItemClick for send item should emit NavigateToViewSendItem`()
.`ItemClick should show alert if ItemType is DecryptionError`()
.`on ShareCipherDecryptionErrorClick should send ShowShareSheet`()
.`UpgradeToPremiumClick should emit NavigateToUrl when in-app upgrade not available`()
.`UpgradeToPremiumClick should emit NavigateToPlanModal when in-app upgrade available`()
.`ArchiveClick without Premium should show ArchiveRequiresPremium dialog`()
.`ArchiveClick with ArchiveCipherResult Success should emit a ShowSnackbar event`()
.`ArchiveClick with ArchiveCipherResult Failure should show generic error`()
.`ArchiveClick with ArchiveCipherResult error with errorMessage should display that message`()
.`UnarchiveClick with UnarchiveCipherResult Success should emit a ShowSnackbar event`()
.`UnarchiveClick with UnarchiveCipherResult Failure should show generic error`()
.`UnarchiveClick with UnarchiveCipherResult error with errorMessage should display that message`()
.`MasterPasswordRepromptSubmit for a request Error should show a generic error dialog`()
.`MasterPasswordRepromptSubmit for a request Success with an invalid password should show an invalid password dialog`()
.`MasterPasswordRepromptSubmit for a request Success with a valid password for autofill should post to the AutofillSelectionManager`()
.`MasterPasswordRepromptSubmit for a request Success with a valid password for accessibility autofill should post to the AccessibilitySelectionManager`()
.`MasterPasswordRepromptSubmit for a request Success with a valid password for overflow actions should process the action`()
.`MasterPasswordRepromptSubmit with a valid password for totp flow should emit NavigateToEditCipher`()
.`AddVaultItemClick inside a folder should show item selection dialog state`()
.`AddVaultItemClick inside a collection should show item selection dialog state`()
.`AddVaultItemClick inside a folder should hide card item selection dialog state when RESTRICT_ITEM_TYPES policy is enabled`()
.`AddVaultItemClick inside a collection should hide card item selection dialog state when RESTRICT_ITEM_TYPES policy is enabled`()
.`AddVaultItemClick for vault item should emit NavigateToAddVaultItem`()
.`AddVaultItemClick for text send item should emit NavigateToAddVaultItem`()
.`AddVaultItemClick for file send item with Premium should emit NavigateToAddVaultItem`()
.`AddVaultItemClick for file send item without Premium should display error dialog`()
.`ItemTypeToAddSelected sends NavigateToAddFolder for folder selection`()
.`ItemTypeToAddSelected sends NavigateToAddFolder for any other selection`()
.`FolderClick for vault item should emit NavigateToFolderItem`()
.`CollectionClick for vault item should emit NavigateToCollectionItem`()
.`RefreshClick should sync`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Send ViewClick should emit NavigateToViewSendItem`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Send EditClick should emit NavigateToEditSendItem`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Send CopyUrlClick should call setText on clipboardManager`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Send DeleteClick with deleteSend error should display error dialog`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Send DeleteClick with deleteSend success should emit ShowSnackbar`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Send ShareUrlClick should emit ShowShareSheet`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Send RemovePasswordClick with removePasswordSend error should display error dialog`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Send RemovePasswordClick with removePasswordSend success should emit ShowSnackbar`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault CopyNoteClick should call setText on the ClipboardManager`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault CopyNumberClick should call setText on the ClipboardManager`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault CopyPasswordClick should call setText on the ClipboardManager`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault CopySecurityCodeClick should call setText on the ClipboardManager`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault CopyTotpClick with GenerateTotpCode success should call setText on the ClipboardManager`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault CopyTotpClick with GenerateTotpCode failure should not call setText on the ClipboardManager`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault CopyUsernameClick should call setText on the ClipboardManager`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault EditClick should emit NavigateToEditCipher`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault LaunchClick should emit NavigateToUrl`()
.`OverflowOptionClick Vault ViewClick should emit NavigateToUrl`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with items should update ViewState to Content`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with items and autofill filtering should update ViewState to Content with filtered data`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with items and totp data filtering should update ViewState to Content with filtered data`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with items and fido2 filtering should update ViewState to Content with filtered data`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with empty items should update ViewState to NoItems content for Login ItemListingType`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with empty items should update ViewState to NoItems content for Card ItemListingType`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with empty items should update ViewState to NoItems content for Identity ItemListingType`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with empty items should update ViewState to NoItems content for SecureNote ItemListingType`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with empty items should update ViewState to NoItems content for SendFile ItemListingType`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with empty items should update ViewState to NoItems content for SendText ItemListingType`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loaded with trash items should update ViewState to NoItems`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Loading should update state to Loading`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Pending with data should update state to Content`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Pending with empty data should update state to NoItems`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Pending with trash data should update state to NoItems`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Error without data should update state to Error`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Error with data should update state to Content`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Error with empty data should update state to NoItems`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow Error with trash data should update state to NoItems`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow NoNetwork without data should update state to Error`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow NoNetwork with data should update state to Content`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow NoNetwork with empty data should update state to NoItems`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow NoNetwork with trash data should update state to NoItems`()
.`vaultDataStateFlow updates should do nothing when switching accounts`()
.`icon loading state updates should update isIconLoadingDisabled`()
.`RefreshPull should call vault repository sync`()
.`RefreshPull should show network error if no internet connection`()
.`PullToRefreshEnableReceive should update isPullToRefreshEnabled`()
.`CreateCredentialRequest should be evaluated before observing vault data`()
